task.dependencies:
DCs:
e1: clean(varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support: $varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support1, post_opq_anxiety: $post_opq_anxiety1, pre_opq_discomfort: $pre_opq_discomfort1, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days1, varicose_vein_pre_opq_score: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_score1, varicose_veineq_five_d_index: $varicose_veineq_five_d_index1, varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour1, post_opq_discomfort: $post_opq_discomfort1, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1, post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1, varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling1, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour1), clean(varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support: $varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support2, post_opq_anxiety: $post_opq_anxiety2, pre_opq_discomfort: $pre_opq_discomfort2, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days2, varicose_vein_pre_opq_score: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_score2, varicose_veineq_five_d_index: $varicose_veineq_five_d_index2, varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour2, post_opq_discomfort: $post_opq_discomfort2, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling2, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour2), $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1 == $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, $varicose_veineq_five_d_index1 != $varicose_veineq_five_d_index2 -> #fail.
e2: clean(varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support: $varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support1, post_opq_anxiety: $post_opq_anxiety1, pre_opq_discomfort: $pre_opq_discomfort1, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days1, varicose_vein_pre_opq_score: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_score1, varicose_veineq_five_d_index: $varicose_veineq_five_d_index1, varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour1, post_opq_discomfort: $post_opq_discomfort1, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1, post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1, varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling1, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour1), clean(varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support: $varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support2, post_opq_anxiety: $post_opq_anxiety2, pre_opq_discomfort: $pre_opq_discomfort2, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days2, varicose_vein_pre_opq_score: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_score2, varicose_veineq_five_d_index: $varicose_veineq_five_d_index2, varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour2, post_opq_discomfort: $post_opq_discomfort2, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling2, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour2), $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1 == $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, $post_opq_anxiety1 != $post_opq_anxiety2 -> #fail.
e3: clean(varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support: $varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support1, post_opq_anxiety: $post_opq_anxiety1, pre_opq_discomfort: $pre_opq_discomfort1, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days1, varicose_vein_pre_opq_score: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_score1, varicose_veineq_five_d_index: $varicose_veineq_five_d_index1, varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour1, post_opq_discomfort: $post_opq_discomfort1, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1, post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1, varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling1, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour1), clean(varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support: $varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support2, post_opq_anxiety: $post_opq_anxiety2, pre_opq_discomfort: $pre_opq_discomfort2, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days2, varicose_vein_pre_opq_score: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_score2, varicose_veineq_five_d_index: $varicose_veineq_five_d_index2, varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour2, post_opq_discomfort: $post_opq_discomfort2, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling2, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour2), $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1 == $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, $post_opq_discomfort1 != $post_opq_discomfort2 -> #fail.
e4: clean(varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support: $varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support1, post_opq_anxiety: $post_opq_anxiety1, pre_opq_discomfort: $pre_opq_discomfort1, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days1, varicose_vein_pre_opq_score: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_score1, varicose_veineq_five_d_index: $varicose_veineq_five_d_index1, varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour1, post_opq_discomfort: $post_opq_discomfort1, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1, post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1, varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling1, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour1), clean(varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support: $varicose_vein_post_opq_left_support2, post_opq_anxiety: $post_opq_anxiety2, pre_opq_discomfort: $pre_opq_discomfort2, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_pain_days2, varicose_vein_pre_opq_score: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_score2, varicose_veineq_five_d_index: $varicose_veineq_five_d_index2, varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_left_discolour2, post_opq_discomfort: $post_opq_discomfort2, pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile: $post_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling: $varicose_vein_pre_opq_swelling2, varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour: $varicose_vein_post_opq_right_discolour2), $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile1 == $pre_opqeq_five_d_index_profile2, $pre_opq_discomfort1 != $pre_opq_discomfort2 -> #fail.
